name: 827. Making A Large Island
description:
You are given an n x n binary matrix grid. You are allowed to change at most one 0 to be 1.

Return the size of the largest island in grid after applying this operation.

Visuals:
- Grid State: The input binary matrix.
- Visited/IDs: Tracks Component IDs (Starts at 2).
- Component Sizes: Map of `{ID: Size}`.
- Variables: Tracks Max Area and Current Area.
- BFS Queue: For graph traversal.
